Items.Title: Turkiye exit World Cup in defiance as USA receive harsh wake-up call to knockout hopes
Items.Description: On paper, it was the first dead rubber of the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Türkiye had already been eliminat

Items.Title: Turkey end World Cup on high with last-gasp win over USA
Items.Description: Turkey come out on top in the last minute of an end-to-end 3-2 win over a second string USA side, in their final Group D match at SoFi Stadium in Los Angeles.

Items.Title: Group winners USA beaten as Turkey restore pride with thrilling victory
Items.Description: Eliminated Turkey scored a 98th-minute winner to clinch a 3-2 victory over World Cup co-hosts USA, who will face Bosnia-Herzegovina in the round of 32.

Items.Title: Türkiye #BizimÇocuklar 🇹🇷
Items.Description:
2026 FIFA Dünya Kupası D Grubu üçüncü ve son maçında ABD'yi 3-2 mağlup eden A Millî Takımımızın Teknik Direktörü Vincenzo Montella, maç sonrası yaptığı basın toplantısında açıklamalarda bulundu.
